findings.evidence: `rg` hit: `144:  change (f + -g : HolderMap α β r) x = f x - g x`; Mathlib has the stable coercion lemma `BoundedContinuousFunction.coe_sub` at `mathlib/Mathlib/Topology/ContinuousMap/Bounded/Basic.lean:657`.
findings.fix: Avoid the `change` by defining subtraction with a pointwise `BoundedContinuousFunction` subtraction proof so `sub_apply` is `rfl`, or add a short comment documenting the unavoidable definitional mismatch.
findings.issue: `sub_apply` uses `change` without a comment explaining why this definitional bridge is needed.

summary: One proof-quality issue remains: `sub_apply` uses undocumented goal-shaping with `change`, relying on the current definitional shape of the `Sub` instance.
